title: ReactJsonComponent AST Node
description: JSON representation of a React Element (JSON AST).

type.description: HTML tag (e.g. 'div', 'p') or registered component name (e.g. 'Button').

contextName.description: Exposes props.value as {{ context.name }} to all descendant AST nodes.

$if.description: Conditional rendering expression, e.g. '{{ state.show }}'. The node is only evaluated and inserted if truthy.

$each.description: Expression returning an array for list rendering, e.g. '{{ state.items }}'.

$key.description: Key expression mapped for each item generated by $each. e.g. '{{ item.id }}'.

$as.description: Variable namespace for current list item iteration (default: 'item').

$indexAs.description: Variable namespace for current list iteration index (default: 'index').

action.description: The name of the pre-registered action handler to dispatch.

args.description: Static or {{ expression }} arguments to spread sequentially into the action callback.

serverAction.description: If true, this event defers to the Next.js server actions pipeline.
